models.name: GLM-5V-Turbo (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: GLM-5V-Turbo is Zhipu's first multimodal Coding foundation model, built for visual programming tasks. Capable of natively processing multimodal inputs including images, videos, and text, while excelling at long-range planning, complex programming, and action execution; deeply adapted to Agent workflows, capable of deep collaboration with Claude Code, OpenClaw and other Agents to complete the complete closed loop of 'understanding environment -> planning actions -> executing tasks'.

models.name: GLM-5.1 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: GLM-5.1 is Zhipu's latest flagship model, with greatly enhanced code capabilities, significantly improved long-range tasks, capable of working continuously and autonomously for up to 8 hours in a single task, completing the complete closed loop from planning, execution to iterative optimization, delivering engineering-level results.

models.name: GLM-5-Turbo (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: GLM-5-Turbo is a foundation model deeply optimized for OpenClaw lobster scenarios. Specifically optimized from the training stage for the core needs of lobster tasks, enhancing core capabilities such as tool calling, instruction following, scheduled and persistent tasks, and long-chain execution, making it truly executable in complex, dynamic, and long-chain tasks.

models.name: GLM-4.7 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: GLM-4.7 is Zhipu's latest flagship model. GLM-4.7 strengthens coding capabilities, long-range task planning, and tool collaboration for Agentic Coding scenarios, and achieves leading performance among open-source models in multiple public benchmark current leaderboards. General capabilities improved, replies more concise and natural, writing more immersive. In executing complex agent tasks, stronger instruction following when tool calling, Artifacts and Agentic Coding frontend aesthetics and long-range task completion efficiency further improved.

models.name: GLM-4.7-Flash
models.tooltip: GLM-4.7-Flash as a 30B-level SOTA model provides a new option balancing performance and efficiency. Strengthens coding capabilities, long-range task planning, and tool collaboration for Agentic Coding scenarios, and achieves leading performance among same-size open-source models in multiple public benchmark current leaderboards. In executing complex agent tasks, stronger instruction following when tool calling, Artifacts and Agentic Coding frontend aesthetics and long-range task completion efficiency further improved.

models.name: GLM-4.7-FlashX (PayGo)
models.tooltip: GLM-4.7-Flash as a 30B-level SOTA model provides a new option balancing performance and efficiency. Strengthens coding capabilities, long-range task planning, and tool collaboration for Agentic Coding scenarios, and achieves leading performance among same-size open-source models in multiple public benchmark current leaderboards. In executing complex agent tasks, stronger instruction following when tool calling, Artifacts and Agentic Coding frontend aesthetics and long-range task completion efficiency further improved.

models.name: GLM-4.6 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: GLM-4.6 is Zhipu's language model with 355B total parameters and 32B activated parameters. GLM-4.6 surpasses GLM-4.5 in all core capabilities

models.name: GLM-4.6V (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: ZHIPU GLM-4.6V - Zhipu's latest visual reasoning model, visual understanding accuracy reaches same-scale SOTA, fully supports tool calling, supports 128k super long context, and is specially optimized for Coding scenarios.

models.name: GLM-4.5-Air (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: ZHIPU GLM-4.5-Air - High cost-performance model, lightweight design, strong performance

models.name: GLM-5 (PayGo)
models.tooltip: GLM-5 is Zhipu's new generation flagship foundation model, built for Agentic Engineering, capable of providing reliable productivity in complex engineering systems and long-range Agent tasks. In Coding and Agent capabilities, GLM-5 achieves open-source SOTA performance, with usage experience in real programming scenarios approaching Claude Opus 4.5, excelling in complex engineering systems and long-range Agent tasks, making it an ideal foundation for general Agent assistants.
